---
title: "Lab 4c: Summarizing Heat Exposure by Neighborhood"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · ArcGIS Online track · Day 4"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab04c_HeatExposure_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab04c_HeatExposure_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab04c_RasterZonal_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab04c_RasterZonal_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab4c-online.md >}}
